allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('app/classifier/models/model_card.json'\)\); m=d['metrics']; print\('top1:', m.get\('test_top1'\)\); print\('top5:', m.get\('test_top5'\)\); print\('golden_top1:', m.get\('test_top1_golden'\)\); print\('golden_top5:', m.get\('test_top5_golden','MISSING'\)\); print\('per_class keys:', len\(m.get\('per_class',{}\)\)\)")
